rationale: Ukraine reclaiming territory and doubling attacks on Russian logistics is directly relevant to every Ukrainian's life — a positive battlefield development, though the war baseline remains high and this is a continuation of last cycle's uptick.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukrainian forces are making tangible gains and disrupting Russian supply lines — directly positive for Ukrainian residents facing daily war pressure, though the overall war situation remains severe.

top_events.title: Trump-Iran deal dispute — US attention partially diverted
top_events.summary: Ongoing US-Iran nuclear negotiations keep Washington's diplomatic bandwidth split; no concrete Western aid cut to Ukraine confirmed, but distraction risk persists.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO — Musk financial power grows
top_events.summary: Musk's increased financial clout is indirectly relevant to Ukraine given his past Starlink decisions; no immediate policy change, but worth monitoring.
